summary: Full stack testing of FomoFam MVP. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend sections load correctly. Login/register/waitlist flows work. One bug found in map filter logic.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Conferences' filter tag shows 'No events found for this filter.' even though 3 conference events exist. Root cause: filter uses `tag.includes(activeTag)` but tag='Conference' doesn't include 'Conferences'. The check direction should be reversed or use bidirectional matching.

issues: Section only shows 7 visible event type cards initially (Hackathons, Networking, Conferences, Meetups, Workshops, Music Events, Art Shows, Sports) - 8 total after scroll

action_items: Fix filter tag matching in MapSection.jsx line 57: Change `t.toLowerCase().includes(activeTag.toLowerCase())` to also check `activeTag.toLowerCase().includes(t.toLowerCase())` OR normalize filter tag labels to match event tags exactly (e.g., 'Conference' instead of 'Conferences')
critical_code_review_comments: MapSection.jsx filter logic bug: `e.tags?.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(activeTag.toLowerCase()))` is wrong direction for plural/singular mismatches. Event tags have 'Conference' but filter button shows 'Conferences'. Fix: use `activeTag.toLowerCase().includes(t.toLowerCase()) || t.toLowerCase().includes(activeTag.toLowerCase())`
backend/.env line 3 has a formatting issue: CORS_ORIGINS and JWT_SECRET are on the same line without newline separator - may cause config parsing issues depending on load_dotenv behavior
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup') - should use lifespan context manager for FastAPI 0.95+

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all sections load, login/register/waitlist work, 1 filter bug)

seed_data_creation: TEST_fomofam_user@example.com registered via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% passing. All UI sections verified: Hero, Navbar, Map+filter, Event Detail (Seoul Web3 Builder Meetup with milestones), How It Works, Community (6 cards), For Organizers, Reputation, Event Types (8 cards), Footer. Auth modal works (Sign In / Get Started tabs + Google OAuth). Login shows 'Hi, [FirstName]' + 'Log out' in navbar. Waitlist shows success message. ONE BUG: filter tag 'Conferences' returns no results - fix in MapSection.jsx line 57.
rca_of_issue: Filter tag mismatch: UI shows 'Conferences' but event seed data has tags=['Conference']. Filter check `tag.includes('conferences')` fails since 'conference' does not contain 'conferences'. Fix: reverse check OR rename filter tag to 'Conference'.
